en: Remind them to be submissive to rulers and authorities, to be obedient, to be ready for every good work,
zh: 你要提醒他們服從執政的和掌權的，聽從他們，隨時準備作各種善工。

en: to speak evil of no one, to avoid quarreling, to be gentle, and to show perfect courtesy toward all people.
zh: 不可毀謗人，要與人無爭，謙恭有禮，向眾人表現充分溫柔的心。

en: For we ourselves were once foolish, disobedient, led astray, slaves to various passions and pleasures, passing our days in malice and envy, hated by others and hating one another.
zh: 我們從前也是無知、不順服、受了迷惑、被各種私慾和逸樂所奴役，生活在惡毒和嫉妒之中，是可憎可惡的，並且互相仇視。

en: But when the goodness and loving kindness of God our Savior appeared,
zh: 然而，到了 神我們的救主顯明他的恩慈和憐愛的時候，

en: he saved us, not because of works done by us in righteousness, but according to his own mercy, by the washing of regeneration and renewal of the Holy Spirit,
zh: 他就救了我們，並不是由於我們所行的義，而是照著他的憐憫，藉著重生的洗和聖靈的更新。

en: whom he poured out on us richly through Jesus Christ our Savior,
zh: 聖靈就是 神藉著我們的救主耶穌基督豐豐富富澆灌在我們身上的，

en: so that being justified by his grace we might become heirs according to the hope of eternal life.
zh: 使我們既然因著他的恩典得稱為義，就可以憑著永生的盼望成為後嗣。

en: The saying is trustworthy, and I want you to insist on these things, so that those who have believed in God may be careful to devote themselves to good works. These things are excellent and profitable for people.
zh: 這話是可信的，我願你確實地強調這些事，使信 神的人常常留心作善工；這些都是美事，並且是對人有益的。

en: But avoid foolish controversies, genealogies, dissensions, and quarrels about the law, for they are unprofitable and worthless.
zh: 你要遠避愚昧的辯論、家譜、紛爭和律法上的爭執，因為這都是虛妄無益的。

en: As for a person who stirs up division, after warning him once and then twice, have nothing more to do with him,
zh: 分門結黨的人，警戒一兩次之後，就要和他絕交。

en: knowing that such a person is warped and sinful; he is self-condemned.
zh: 你知道這種人已經背道，常常犯罪，定了自己的罪。

en: When I send Artemas or Tychicus to you, do your best to come to me at Nicopolis, for I have decided to spend the winter there.
zh: 我派亞提馬或推基古到你那裡去的時候，你要趕快到尼哥波立來見我，因為我已決定在那裡過冬。

en: Do your best to speed Zenas the lawyer and Apollos on their way; see that they lack nothing.
zh: 你要盡力資助西納律師和亞波羅的旅程，使他們不致缺乏。

en: And let our people learn to devote themselves to good works, so as to help cases of urgent need, and not be unfruitful.
zh: 我們自己的人也應當學習作善工，供應日常的需要，免得不結果子。

en: All who are with me send greetings to you. Greet those who love us in the faith. Grace be with you all.
zh: 同我在一起的人都向你問安。請你問候那些因信而愛我們的人。願恩惠與你們眾人同在。
